reviews.comment:
Buenos servicios, un poco difícil el acceso desde la ruta. Baños impecables, algunas faltas en el minimercado

(Translated by Google)
Good services, though access from the highway is a bit difficult. The restrooms are spotless, but there are a few issues with the mini-market.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para parar, cargar nafta o ir al baño. Suele llenarse mucho en temporada.

(Translated by Google)
Good place to stop, fill up with gas, or use the restroom. It tends to get very crowded during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbmZ5cmRREAE

reviews.comment:
Para recargar combustible y hacer un descanso con los niños. Hay juegos para ellos y también se puede comer y tomar café!

(Translated by Google)
A place to refuel and take a break with the kids. There are games for them, and you can also eat and drink coffee!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNi15RXlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, tiene baños limpios, una parrilla que no probé y una estación YPF con el típico lugar para comer. Hay mucho lugar para estacionar y una buena arboleda, hay que salir de la ruta. Es una excelente opción para comer unos sándwichs entre los árboles.

(Translated by Google)
Nice spot, with clean restrooms, a grill (which I didn't try), and a YPF gas station with a typical food court. There's plenty of parking and a nice grove of trees; you have to turn off the main road. It's an excellent option for enjoying sandwiches under the trees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRZ01hcDVBRRAB
